repository.name: Riemann-adelic
repository.description: This repository contains a fully unconditional and spectral proof of the Riemann Hypothesis using S-finite adelic systems, without invoking ζ(s) or the Euler product. The canonical operator D(s) ≡ Ξ(s) is constructed geometrically and validated via explicit formulas, Fredholm determinants, and Paley–Wiener uniqueness. Includes formalization in Lean

commit.message:
fix: run test files sequentially to prevent shared-state race conditions

In-memory db.js state is shared across all test files. Without
fileParallelism:false, vitest spawns parallel workers that interfere
with each other (e.g. god_edits PLACE test sees cells from a
concurrent test run). This caused intermittent CI failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: upgrade judge to gpt-5.2, richer prompt, per-player feedback

- JUDGE_MODEL: o4-mini → gpt-5.2
- judgeCastles() now accepts p1Flags/p2Flags/tick context; passes flag
  label list as text alongside the images so model can correlate names
  with visible structures
- Prompt rewritten: 5-criterion rubric (architectural vision, complexity,
  defence, named structures, resilience), asks for 2-4 sentence reasoning
  plus dedicated p1_feedback and p2_feedback fields
- Reasoning cap raised 500 → 1500 chars; feedback fields up to 800 chars
- UI: history judgment block and preview result show p1/p2 feedback
- All 3 call sites (tick.js ×1, god.js ×2) updated to pass flags

commit.message:
fix: implement IFontResolver for PDFsharp on Android

Android has no system fonts accessible to PDFsharp. A custom IFontResolver
loads font TTF bytes from the MAUI app package at runtime and serves them
to PDFsharp synchronously.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: prevent grouping consecutive code blocks with the same language (#667)

* fix: prevent grouping consecutive code blocks with the same language

Two consecutive code blocks with the same language (e.g., both `mjs`)
were incorrectly grouped into a CJS/MJS switchable tab. Add a check
to ensure the two code blocks have different languages before creating
a switchable code tab.

Refs: https://github.com/nodejs/node/pull/62181

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add optional chaining for defensive null safety

* fix: update to assume [0] and [1] always exist

---------

commit.message:
fix: add explicit itext.bouncy-castle-adapter reference for Android

iText7 9.x requires the BouncyCastle adapter to be an explicit package
reference — it is no longer auto-resolved as a transitive dependency on
Android, causing a MissingAssemblyException at runtime.

Scribe: Orchestration record — Kaylee iText7 migration

- Agent: Kaylee (MAUI Dev)
- Work: Replaced QuestPDF v2026.2.3 with iText7 v9.1.0 (Issue #17 Android compatibility fix)
- Reason: QuestPDF has zero Android support (native Linux libraries only); iText7 is pure .NET

- Namespace conflicts resolved: Path vs iText.Kernel.Geom.Path, Cell vs iText.Layout.Element.Cell, SetBold() → SimulateBold()
- Build: 0 errors
- Artifacts: Orchestration log, session log, Kaylee history updated, decisions.md merged

- [x] Enhance `traffic-policy/concepts/ip-policies.mdx` to be a
comprehensive guide:
  - [x] Add introductory explanation with `allow`/`deny` rules context
- [x] Add "Creating and managing IP Policies" section (dashboard + API)

reference

- [x] Add "Related resources" section linking to Restrict IPs action, IP

commit.message:
Fix falsy enum values returning None instead of name

AlarmReason.NO_ALARM has value 0, making it falsy in Python. The
_enum_to_lowercase function used 'if enum_value' which incorrectly
returned None for NO_ALARM. Changed to 'if enum_value is not None'
to properly handle zero-valued Flag enums.

This caused battery_monitor alarm and dc_energy_meter alarm to show
as 'unknown' instead of 'no_alarm' in Home Assistant.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Files: azqlite.h → sqlite_objs.h, azqlite_vfs.c → sqlite_objs_vfs.c

commit.message:
Ignore pmon DomInfoUpdateTask VDM basic real values error in loganalyzer (#22905)

The error 'Failed to get VDM basic real values for port' is logged by
pmon#DomInfoUpdateTask periodically on some platforms (e.g. Arista 7060X6-512)
when a port does not support VDM basic real values. This causes LogAnalyzer
to fail tests that are otherwise functionally passing.

Tracking issue: https://github.com/aristanetworks/sonic-qual.msft/issues/1156

Signed-off-by: Bing Wang <bingwang@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: resolve Clang and MSVC CI build failures

Clang (tests-clang):
- Switch from clang-15 to clang-18 (available in Ubuntu noble's standard
  repos — no extra PPA needed)
- Remove g++-15 install from Clang job: mixing clang-15 with GCC 15's
  stdlib caused std::ranges::empty_view concept resolution failures;
  clang-18 + default GCC 14 stdlib is a well-tested combination

MSVC (tests-msvc) and all compilers:
- Add add_compile_definitions(BOOST_UT_DISABLE_MODULE) in tests/CMakeLists.txt
  Boost.UT v2.1.0 unconditionally emits 'export module boost.ut' when
  __cpp_modules is defined, causing fatal error C3378 under MSVC
  (/std:c++latest). Disabling module mode forces header-only inclusion
  which works with all three compilers.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: per-subscription push visibility filtering

Previously, push notifications used a global visibility  if ANYcheck
connected client tab was visible, no push was sent to any device. This
meant a visible desktop tab suppressed phone notifications.

Now each push subscription endpoint is associated with its client IDs.
sendToAll skips only endpoints that have at least one visible client.
Endpoints with no visible client (or no connected client) receive push
as expected.

- Add registerClient(clientId, endpoint) to PushService
- Add isEndpointVisible() for per-endpoint visibility check
- Move visibility filtering from maybeNotify into sendToAll
- Frontend sends clientId on /api/push/subscribe
- New /api/push/register-client endpoint for SSE reconnect
- Frontend auto-registers push endpoint on each SSE connect

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
cfl: add applysearch fuzzer + PCC coverage + UTF-16 seeds

- Exercises CIccCmmSearch: costFunc, boundsCheck, findMin, Begin, Apply
- IccCmmSearch.cpp coverage: 0% → 17.2% functions, 20% lines
- Split-input format: 2 profiles + control bytes for intent/interp/bounds/PCC

Modified: icc_applynamedcmm_fuzzer.cpp for PCC profile coverage
- Optionally passes profile as PCC via ReadPccTags() + AddXform(pPcc)
- IccPcc.cpp coverage: 31.8% → 31.8% (needs fuzzing time to improve)

UTF-16 seed profiles (IccConvertUTF.cpp 36.8% → target ~55%):
- SEED_UTF16_Emoji: surrogate pairs (U+1F44D, U+1F3A8, U+1F52C)
- SEED_UTF16_Malformed: unpaired high/low surrogates (error paths)
- SEED_UTF16_Boundary: U+FFFD/FFFE/FFFF noncharacters + BOM
- SEED_UTF16_MultiLang: 7 scripts (Arabic, Hebrew, Thai, CJK, JP, KR)
Distributed to 5 CFL corpora + 2 AFL input dirs

Coverage: Lines 55.08%, Functions 58.19% (12 fuzzers, replay only)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Use libsqlite3-sys instead of bundled amalgamation, add Azure smoke tests

Switch azqlite-sys from compiling sqlite3.c directly to depending on
libsqlite3-sys v0.36 (bundled). Upgrade rusqlite to v0.38. Build.rs
now gets SQLite include path from DEP_SQLITE3_INCLUDE.

Add 3 integration smoke tests (ignored by default, need Azure creds):
- smoke_create_table_insert_query: CREATE/INSERT/SELECT round-trip
- smoke_multiple_transactions: multi-txn commit + update verification
- smoke_reopen_persists: close and reopen, verify data durability

Run with: source .env && cargo test --test azure_smoke -- --ignored

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
ci: merge into single job with MySQL service container and checkout@v6

- Merge unit-tests and integration-tests into a single 'tests' job so
  both run in the same environment (same runner, single checkout and build)
- Unit tests step gates integration tests: if it fails, subsequent steps
  are skipped automatically
- Replace manual Docker management with a GitHub Actions MySQL service
  container (fixed port 3306, TCP health check, auto-cleaned up)
- Upgrade actions/checkout@v4 -> @v6 which runs on Node.js 24, fixing
  the 'Node.js 20 actions are deprecated' warning
- Remove FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 env var (no longer needed)
- Install mysql-client alongside other deps in the single Install step
- Use explicit CTest -R filter per test suite instead of running all

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
